locations.name: Woodsworth College Residence
locations.brief_description: You are on the fourth floor of Woodsworth Residence. A ticket might be the key to winning the Minion Prize.
locations.long_description: You are on the fourth floor of Woodsworth Residence, where the Minion Prize Competition is underway. The floor is Minion-themed, and students are hunting for prize tickets. If you have a **ticket**, you can win a Minion here. Maybe it’s hidden somewhere on campus...

locations.name: Carr Hall
locations.brief_description: You are on the roof of Carr Hall. The lucky mug is within reach—if you have enough stars.
locations.long_description: Carr Hall’s roof offers a beautiful view, but your attention is drawn to a **lucky mug** resting on a table. It seems important, but it looks like you’ll need a **yellow star, blue star, and red star** to claim it. Time to go star hunting!

clue.moon: It doesn’t make its own light.
clue.rain: It’s part of the water cycle.

locations.name: Victoria Colleges
locations.brief_description: You are in Victoria Colleges. Could there be a red star nearby?
locations.long_description: The ivy-covered walls of Victoria Colleges are peaceful and academic. As you walk around, a faint glimmer catches your eye—a **red star** near a garden bench. Keep your eyes open; there might be more stars elsewhere.

clue.jump: You use your legs to do it.
clue.fire: It needs fuel to keep going.

locations.name: Health Science
locations.brief_description: You are in the Health Science Building. Something shiny and valuable lies here.
locations.long_description: The Health Science Building is bustling with students. Near a bulletin board, you spot a **yellow star** glowing softly. Not far away, there’s a **ticket** sitting on a bench. This ticket might just lead you back to Woodsworth for the Minion Prize.

clue.fire: It can be created with a spark.
clue.rain: It can be light or heavy.
clue.clock: It can be big or small.

locations.name: Bahen
locations.brief_description: You are in Bahen Centre. A blue star and a robot await discovery.
locations.long_description: Bahen Centre is a hub of innovation and creativity. Among the desks, you find a **blue star** near a workstation. A small **robot** stands nearby—it might be important for claiming that star.

clue.tree: It can be tall or short.
clue.jump: It helps you go over obstacles.
clue.fire: It can be orange, red, or blue.
clue.wind: It can be strong or gentle.
clue.clock: It usually hangs on a wall or sits on a desk.

locations.name: Myhal Center
locations.brief_description: You are in Myhal Center. A loonie and a robot might help you on your journey.
locations.long_description: Myhal Center is sleek and modern, with plenty of study spaces. On the floor, you spot a **loonie**—just enough for a coffee. A **robot** on a nearby table might also be useful later. Don’t forget to check Bahen Centre for that blue star!

clue.jump: Some animals do it to move.
clue.wind: It’s caused by air pressure changes.
clue.rain: You need an umbrella when it happens.

locations.name: Tim Hortons
locations.brief_description: You are in Tim Hortons. Maybe a loonie can get you an ice cap.
locations.long_description: Tim Hortons is lively, filled with the smell of coffee and pastries. You see an **ice cap** waiting for you on the counter. If you have a **loonie**, you might just be able to claim it.

clue.fire: It was important in human evolution.
clue.wind: It helps birds and kites fly.

locations.name: Medical Science
locations.brief_description: You are in the Medical Science Building. Yaka might trade a laptop charger for minion.
locations.long_description: The Medical Science Building is a labyrinth of research labs. Yaka, the floor’s guardian, loves collecting minions. If you offer her enough, she might give you a **laptop charger** in return. Time to gather minions!

clue.jump: You can do it on a trampoline.
clue.fire: Campers use it to stay warm.
clue.wind: Hurricanes and tornadoes are made of it.

locations.name: Robart Library
locations.brief_description: You are in Robarts Library. A USB is hidden among the books.
locations.long_description: Robarts Library is vast and filled with knowledge. As you explore the rows of bookshelves, you find a **USB** tucked between some books. If you’ve recently claimed an **ice cap**, this USB could be useful.

clue.jump: It means to push yourself into the air.
clue.fire: It’s made of flames and burns.
clue.rain: It falls as drops from clouds.

items.name: minion
items.description: The grand prize of the Minion Prize Competition at Woodsworth College!

items.name: lucky mug
items.description: The mug you’ve been searching for! It’s safe and sound. It’s time to bring this back to Woodsworth.

items.name: yellow star
items.description: A shiny yellow star. It looks important. Maybe collecting all the stars will lead to something special at Carr Hall.

items.name: red star
items.description: A radiant red star. Another piece of the puzzle for finding the lucky mug. Keep looking for the other stars!

items.name: blue star
items.description: A bright blue star. Head back to Carr Hall.

items.name: robot
items.description: A small, cool robot. It seems connected to the **blue star**. Take it with you—it might come in handy!

items.name: ticket
items.description: Congrats! You found a prize ticket! Take it back to Woodsworth College to win the Minion.

items.name: laptop charger
items.description: A lifesaving laptop charger. It’s time to bring this back to Woodsworth.

items.name: loonie
items.description: A shiny Canadian loonie! This might be just enough to get a free **ice cap** at Tim Hortons.

items.name: ice cap
items.description: A refreshing ice cap! If you’ve got this, maybe you can find something useful at Robarts Library.

items.name: usb
items.description: A USB drive with important data. It’s time to bring this back to Woodsworth.
